svg.title: Thesis Completion Roadmap - PolicyChecker
svg.desc: Visual roadmap showing current metrics, blockers, and action items for final thesis defense
svg.text: Current state & what's needed for a successful defense
M4 = 0.0 → Inject ontology vocab into SHACL prompt
Sole annotator bias → Recruit 2-3 external annotators
No confidence intervals → Add CI to all metrics
27K violations → Likely false positives from path mismatch
Honest metrics → Report 84.1%, not inflated numbers
• Show root cause analysis + mitigation path
• Position as contribution: diagnostic framework itself
① "Threats to Validity" section (annotator bias, scope)
② Revised results tables with confidence intervals
⑤ Qualified comparison tables (no cross-dataset claims)
⑦ Concrete ABA examples for ambiguity resolution
